SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 08

JUDGE PRO TEM JONATHAN STEINER MARGARET PENDERGAST, ATTY FOR PLTF. DEFT IN PROPER 2:35 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PRESENT, IN CHAMBERS, CASE SETTLED, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AND AGAINST DEFT FOR RESTIT. & POSS OF THE PREMISES. WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT EVICTION STAYED UNTIL 9/30/93. PLTF. WAIVES ANY RENTS DUE. PLTF. TO RETURN $700 TO DEFT. AND WILL ACCOUNT FOR SECURITY DEPOSIT ACCORDING TO LAW. THERE WILL BE A MUTUAL WAIVER OF CAUSES OF ACTION. IF DEFT VACATES THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 9/30/93, PLTF WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLTF. WILL PREPARE THE JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO DEFT FOR APPROVAL.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
STIPULATED JUDGMENT FILED ONLY AS STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, BRIAN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CENTENO, LUIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 477 MONTEREY BLVD, S.F, STAYED UNTIL SEP-30-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF HAS RETURNED $700.00 TO DEFT AND WILL ACCOUNT FOR THE SECURITY DEPOSIT PURS 1950.5CC. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
